title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at AirAsia Cargo India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at AirAsia Cargo India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the AirAsia Cargo India family as a Distribution Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AirAsia Cargo India:
AirAsia Cargo India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia Cargo India!
